dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: Agent demonstrated strong adherence to provided architectural rules and constraints, ensuring compliance with organizational governance standards.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: Successfully identified primary cause-effect relationships within the architecture, though secondary ripple effects across distributed components could be deeper.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: Effectively surfaced key trade-offs between scalability and consistency, proposing a pragmatic resolution that balances performance with data integrity.
